---
title: "Accounting for Multiple Covariates in Non-Stationary Geostatistical Modelling"
subtitle: "arXiv preprint arXiv:2412.09225 (2024)"
date: 2024-12-01
authors:
  - Olatunji Johnson
  - Bedilu A. Ejigu
  - Eniola Gayawan
categories: ["Preprint"]
---

**Links:** [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.09225)

**Summary.** Extends non-stationary geostatistical models to incorporate multiple spatially varying covariates, allowing the spatial covariance structure to change across the study region in a way that is informed by observed environmental and demographic predictors.
